summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 813

core_modules.description: Primary ObsPy data model and top-level waveform loading entry points; best MCP surface for waveform-centric tasks.
FDSN web service access layer for waveform/station/event retrieval; most useful remote-data integration module.
MiniSEED I/O implementation behind core read/write plugin system; critical for seismic waveform interoperability.
Core signal-processing utilities frequently used in workflows after loading traces/streams.
Travel-time and phase-arrival modeling for event analysis and synthetic timing workflows.
Geodetic helpers used across event-location, travel-time, and station-distance computations.

cli_commands.name: obspy-print
cli_commands.description: CLI utility to inspect waveform/event metadata from supported files.

cli_commands.description: CLI tool to resolve Flinn-Engdahl geographic region from coordinates.

cli_commands.name: obspy-reftek-rescue
cli_commands.description: CLI utility for salvaging Reftek data from raw/partial media.

cli_commands.name: obspy-sds-report
cli_commands.description: CLI report generation for SDS archive quality/coverage.
